DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS INTERDENT, INC., FELDMAN DENTAL CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Aaron Gorfein of the Law Office of Elizabeth F. McDonald (no phone number provided) appearing for plaintiff and opposing party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Interdent, Inc. and Feldman Dental Corporation's demurrer to the second and third causes of action is overruled. Plaintiff Susan Chan adequately alleges claims for breach of contract and breach of the covenant of good faith and fair dealing. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Continued To Jun-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
